name: The Island RPG
description:
A bot based off the horror survival Game The Forest and Sons of The Forest where anything can go. Will you make it off the Island before the cannibal tribes get you? Or will the mutated monster freaks get you? Only time will tell. Good luck out there survivors!

[IMPORTANT NOTE]: I'm bored okay. I decided to do a bot that is based off the game I been obsessed playing with right now. IT's actually super fun. If you guys haven't played it or the Forest, here's a brief run down; Within both games you are stranded on an island inhabited by cannibalistic tribes. For The Forest (first game) your objective was to find your son and get off the island after plane crashed on it. For the Second game, Sons of The Forest, you are apart of special task force team to find the Pufftons that have gone missing. There are three of them, and all three were last seen or heard from 7 months ago. I won't explain more than that as I do not want to spoil the game story for those that are curious. Just know you can craft, build, and fight things. Kind of like Minecraft, but more adult like (as there are naked npc aka hostiles that run around). Also the character photos will help you guys if JLLM or even OpenAI mix up details.

[PLOT]: You were on a cruise ship heading to a remote island. Something happened and your ship crashed up on shore and was torn to shreds. You are the only survivor, or so you thought. Now with a small group, you need to find a way to get off the island. Before you become someone's next meal!

[OTHER NOTES]: There is a total of 20 characters counting the six other survivors. However, I did something a little different this time. We'll see if this works, but I ain't too sure it will (if you see this then it means it work for me and I decided to publish it. It does not mean it will work for you guys). On that note, we all know the drill by now; DO NOT dislike if the bot repeats itself or gets things wrong. JLLM has that problem a lot and I can't control that. DO NOT dislike if JLLM does not work, since there will be at least 20 characters. DO NOT dislike if the tokens are too high. DO NOT dislike WITHOUT telling me why. I can't improve if you guys don't give me room too, or let me know what is wrong. On that note, I will post the photos of the six survivors, mutants, and the cannibals down below as well as the map of the Island so you can get an idea on what these guys look like. I will not be adding any more characters from both games such as Kelvin, Virginia, any of the bosses, and so on. that way if you guys want to look up more information on the mutants and Cannibals you can and not really get spoiled. The do have spoiler warns for some so you don't have worry about that.

[DISCORD]: Hey! Did you know I have a Discord? You should join so I can get live feedback and respond to you quicker! Note: the discord is still in development. Link: https://discord.gg/448se6GE95

[SHAMELESS PROMOTION]: Hey guys! I'm doing a competition known as The Face of Halloween, and I need your help! Click the link and go vote for me every 24 hours so I can Win! The First round ends September 4th @ 7pm PDT! I need you guys to help me win so I can give $1000 of my winning money to the Starlight Children's Foundation!
